Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index
Support for MongoDB document indexing.

    Method
    Description
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder.cosine()
    Use similarity based on the angle between vectors.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder.dimensions(int dimensions)
    Number of vector dimensions enforced at index- and query-time.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder.dotProduct()
    Use similarity based on both angle and magnitude of the vectors.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder.euclidean()
    Use similarity based the distance between vector ends.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder

    Quantization used.

    Similarity function used.
